# Support

Use the right path so requests get handled quickly.

## Bugs

Open a GitHub issue with clear reproduction steps and the smallest useful context.

## Feature Requests

Open a GitHub issue and explain:

- the problem you are trying to solve
- why the current behavior is not enough
- what outcome you want

## Setup and Usage Questions

Start with:

- [README.md](../README.md)
- [docs/development/README.md](../docs/development/README.md)
- [docs/README.md](../docs/README.md)

## Security Reports

Do not post vulnerabilities publicly.

Use [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
